# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-07-06

Gemini Interactions API is now GA and the recommended default for new projects.

Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. API Interactions
   Gemini now points new projects to Interactions API, so interface choice affects cost, state, and retention defaults immediately.

2. 🤗 Kernels: Major Updates
   Hugging Face is turning custom kernels into a first-class, signed, trust-gated distribution channel.

3. sqlite-utils 4.0rc3
   If you rely on sqlite-utils internals, the compound foreign key work and case-insensitive name changes can break assumptions.

4. Does code cleanliness affect coding agents? A controlled minimal-pair study
   It changes the ROI case for cleanup: cleaner code did not raise pass rate, but it cut token use and file thrash for agents.

Full brief with all 40 researched links → https://thenightlylibrarian.com/briefs/2026-07-06
